name: Pumpkin Bread with Crumb Topping
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups firm packed light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour two 9x5x2 inch loaf pans.
3. Beat half the butter in a large bowl until smooth and creamy.
4. Add brown sugar, granulated sugar, and vanilla extract. Beat until light and fluffy.
5. Blend in pumpkin purée. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Mix together flour, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
7. Stir into the batter.
8. Fold in half the pecans and raisins (if using).
9. Spoon batter evenly into pans.
10. With a fork, mix remaining butter, brown sugar, flour, and pecans.
11. Sprinkle over each loaf and pat down lightly.
12. Bake for about 50 minutes or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
13. Cool in pan for 10 minutes before removing to a rack to cool completely.
14. Makes 2 loaves, serving 24 portions, with 255 calories per serving.
